title: The Glowhouse Light Up LED Premium Flashing Star Wand
features: Now you really can wish upon a star, thanks to this simply fabulous Flashing Star Wand! Ideal for party princesses, fun-time fairies and wicked witches!
A discreet button in the silvery handle allows you to select from three effects: Shimmer, Twinkle and Pulse.
Whether you’re casting a spell on a potential Prince Charming or trying to grant a wish to someone who really wants to go to a ball, the Flashing Star Wand adds a little magic to any occasion.
Batteries are included and loaded, so it's ready to go!
description: Product description Now you really can wish upon a star, thanks to this simply fabulous Flashing Star Wand! Ideal for party princesses, fun-time fairies and wicked witches! Made from clear, crystal-effect plastic, the Flashing Star Wand is topped-off with a stunning, five-pointed star, which also houses five bright LEDs, in red, green and blue. At the base, you’ll find a crystal-style disco effect ball that holds a further three. There’re another three hidden in the middle of the wand, giving you a total of 11 illuminating LEDs in total! A discreet button in the silvery handle allows you to select from three vibrant effects: Shimmer, Twinkle and Pulse. Whether you’re casting a spell on a potential Prince Charming or trying to grant a wish to someone who really wants to go to a ball, the Flashing Star Wand adds a little magic to any occasion. 11 bright LEDS LEDs remain cool to touch Batteries included Wand is 14inches in length Simple On/Off/Select function Directions Press the button on the handle to change light effects (Shimmer, Twinkle, Pulse).
